utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 of these sections. Now, check if each is fully specified: (1) health_coverage: contains plan name, coverage details for physical and mental health, deductible, monthly cost—fully detailed. (2) property_coverage: provides coverage categories (electronics, liability, natural disaster, etc.) but lacks explicit cost information, which the format requires ('home/contents insurance with costs'); thus not fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: lists comprehensive coverage categories but again lacks explicit cost; thus not fully specified. (4) additional_services: lists enhancement services but no costs; thus not fully specified. (5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual cost breakdown—fully specified. Therefore, 2 items (health_coverage and total_budget) are fully specified according to required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: (1) Health coverage under 'LifeFirst Standard Plan', which corresponds to both physical and mental health coverage in the ground-truth section under 'primary_health_coverage' → ratings 9 (physical) and 9 (mental). (2) Property coverage is included but unnamed in the plan; given that the health and travel plans are both LifeFirst, the corresponding property plan is 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' in the property_protection section → rating 9. (3) Travel coverage is included and matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' from the mobility_coverage section → rating 9. (4) Additional services include 'Telemedicine' and 'Wellness programs' and 'Executive health programs' (which align with 'Telemedicine Services' rating 8 and 'Wellness Programs' rating 3 in health_enhancement_services). (5) 'International volunteer coverage' relates to travel coverage but has no direct rating; no explicit match in ground-truth, so it is omitted.
